case_title: JULIO XEE VS. DAVID DORNAN et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF XEE, JULIO AS TO DEFENDANT DORNAN, DAVID INDIVIDUALLY & JOINTLY DBA ALBORZ RESTAURANT DORNAN, STACEY INDIVIDUALLY & JOINTLY DBA ALBORZ RESTAURANT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
